user.title: SNMP Switch – Connection
user.description: Enter the host and SNMP version. Credentials are configured in the next step.

community.title: SNMP v1/v2c – Community Strings
community.description:
Read-only access requires only a read community string.
For port toggling and SET services, also provide a write community.

v3.title: SNMP v3 – USM Credentials
v3.description:
Configure username and security level.

**noAuthNoPriv** – username only
**authNoPriv** – auth protocol + passphrase
**authPriv** – auth + encryption (recommended)

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – host unreachable or SNMP not enabled
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed – check community string or USM credentials
error.priv_requires_auth: Privacy requires an auth protocol and auth passphrase

set_port_alias.name: Set Port Alias
set_port_alias.description: Sets the ifAlias of a port via SNMP SET.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Entry ID of the SNMP Switch config entry

contact.name: Contact
contact.description: Name / email of the responsible person
